items.title: Consultor Desenvolvedor PROTHEUS ADVPL
items.description:
Oportunidaade: Consultor Desenvolvedor PROTHEUS ADVPL

Atividades:
- Desenvolvimento em ADVPL, TLPP, MVC
- Desenvolvimento de APIs com JSON
- Desenvolvimento e manutenção de procedures, triggers em banco ORACLE

Requisitos:
- Experiência minima de 5 anos com Protheus – mandatório
- Experiência em Fabrica de Software
- Experiência em Banco de Dados SQL e ORACLE
- Experiência em utilização do GIT
- Senso de dono, saiba trabalhar em equipe, boa comunicação.

Diferencial:
- Conhecimento em Angular e PoUI
- Conhecimento em HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
- Conhecimento da linguagem Java e framework Spring
- Arquitetura web - nível básico
- Conhecimentos de segurança da informação

Disponibilidade:
Regime : PJ
Estado/ Cidade: Indiferente
Inicio: imediato.
Duração: /Longa
Modalidade: Remoto

items.title: REMOTO: ENGENHEIRO DE DADOS
items.description:
## Nossa empresa
A Going2 é uma startup que nasceu em 2012, com o propósito de levar tecnologia de ponta para todo o Brasil, focada em criar produtos que tenham como premissa, facilitar a vida das pessoas e empresas, através do desenvolvimento de Aplicativos, Sistemas e dos princípios de IOT (internet das coisas). Hoje, além de atender clientes nacionais também oferecemos nossos serviços para clientes internacionais, como por exemplo no Canada, Suíça e Estados Unidos.

## Descrição da vaga

 Engenheiro em dados especialista com conhecimento em NodeJS e MySQL


## Local

Remoto 

## Requisitos

Engenheiro em dados especialista com conhecimento em NodeJS e MySQL

## Contratação

PJ

## Como se candidatar

Enviar um e-mail para [recrutamento@going2.com.br](mailto:recrutamento@going2.com.br) contendo currículo e pretensão salarial à hora. Com o assunto: Freelancer Engenheiro de Dados.



## Labels


#### Alocação

- Remoto


#### Regime

- Freela


#### Nível

- Especialista

#### Período
- Projeto

items.title: [REMOTO] Dev BackEnd Sênior - 200DEV
items.description:
**Nossa empresa**
A 200DEV é uma consultoria de TI especializada em Inovação e Transformação Digital
impulsionada pelos maiores fabricantes de tecnologia e desenvolvida por profissionais com
foco no sucesso!

**Descrição da vaga**
Desenvolver código backend utilizando linguagens como Python, Node.js, C#, Go, entre outras.
Trabalhar com bancos de dados relacionais (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server) e NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis).
Implementar sistemas de mensageria como RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka, etc.
Projetar, desenvolver e manter APIs RESTful ou GraphQL para comunicação entre front-end e back-end.
Criar e manter pipelines CI/CD para automatizar processos de construção, teste e implantação de software.
Desenvolver em ambientes de contêineres usando Docker e Kubernetes.
Garantir a segurança da informação em aplicativos, protegendo-os contra vulnerabilidades.
Utilizar sistemas de controle de versão como Git e seguir fluxos de trabalho colaborativos.
Compreender sistemas operacionais (Linux, Windows) e redes de computadores (TCP/IP).
Escrever testes automatizados e depurar problemas de forma eficaz usando linguagens de script como Bash, Python ou PowerShell.

**Local**
Remoto.

**Requisitos**
Proficiência em pelo menos uma linguagem de programação back-end.
Experiência com bancos de dados relacionais e NoSQL.
Conhecimento em sistemas de mensageria.
Capacidade de projetar e desenvolver APIs RESTful ou GraphQL.
Experiência em pipelines CI/CD, contêineres Docker e Kubernetes.
Conhecimentos básicos em segurança da informação.
Familiaridade com sistemas de controle de versão como Git.
Compreensão de sistemas operacionais e redes de computadores.
Habilidade em escrever testes automatizados e depurar problemas.

**Como se candidatar**
Enviar Cv para bruno.sander@200dev.com

items.title: 徵才【日本大阪】NodeJS Backend Developer (年薪100~200萬台幣) 會協助辦工作簽證!
items.description:
📍外派流程:
-外派前2-3個月會先在台灣辦公室上班(台北信義區)，等工作簽證下來後再前往日本
-外派到日本後的第1-2個月先住宿舍，之後會給房屋津貼自行找住宿地點唷

📍產品類型: 博奕遊戲

【工作內容】
1. 開發遊戲伺服器新功能。
2. 與組員合作討論，分析需求定義並實作。
3. 跟 Designer, PM, QA, Devops, Backend, Frontend, APP 合作完成「需求-設計-開發-測試-上線」的流程。
4. 協助不同專案的系統開發、後端程式撰寫及維護，同時適時進行跨專案的支援。
5. 網站的後端及相關 API 開發與串接並確保程式品質。

【技術職能】
1. 熟悉資料庫相關操作(Transaction)與建置(Schema)。
2. 了解程式相關資安維護。
3. 有專案設計、規畫、開發相關工作經驗者佳。
4. 資訊工程或相關科、系(所)畢業佳，具備實際開發經驗則不限。
5. 程式語言需求(二擇一) : (1)Golang (2)NodeJS
6. 資料庫需求(二擇一) : (1) Oracle (2) MySQL

【加分條件】
1. Docker
2. K8S

相關經驗希望2年以上

歡迎將履歷寄 至📩 joanne@recruitexpress.com.tw
來信告知應徵 大阪工作
也可以直接加Joanne Line 好友討論唷! (ID a19901204)

items.description:
<!--

PLEASE REVIEW RULES BEFORE POSTING:

### Salary Expectation

-->

- USD 1K/month 
- Full-Time

### Location

<!--
  Please specify your job's policy on remote work (see README for details)
-->

- Mexico
- Remote

## What You'll Do _(Job Description)_

As a Graphic Designer/Social Media Associate, you will be instrumental in shaping the visual and interactive aspects of our digital presence. You will collaborate with the marketing team to develop a social media calendar, design posts that align with our brand identity, and create a variety of marketing materials that communicate our brand's message effectively.

## What You Need to Be Successful _(Skills)_

### Must Have

- Beginner in brand identity and marketing.

## About Our company

At Acevedo Dental Group we are committed to delivering excellence across all aspects of our brand. We are currently seeking a creative and dynamic Graphic Design/Social Media Assistant to join our marketing team. This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about crafting compelling visuals and engaging content that resonates with audiences and elevates brand visibility.

## How to apply

Please send an email to [arturomontalva@torre.ai] with your resume, use 'Graphic Designer / Social Media Associate' as subject

- Competente en metodologías ágiles, GCP (Google Cloud Platform), TypeScript, React.js, y Microsoft Azure.

En Coordinadora estamos a la vanguardia para ofrecerle un portafolio de servicios, diseñado de acuerdo a las necesidades de transporte de su negocio:

- Envío de mercancía, mensajería y paquetería nacional e internacional.
- Radicación y Firma de documentos
- Casillero Internacional
- Carga masiva
- Carga aérea
- Desconsolidación de contenedores
- Operaciones logísticas e-commerce
- Transporte de Mercancías químicas
- Transporte de Mercancías Pharma
- Empaques a la medida de tus envíos

items.title: [遠端] [底薪 1.3-2.9M] Circle 招募 Junior/Senior/Staff 後端工程師 (Golang)
items.description:
## 團隊簡介
我們是 [Circle](https://www.circle.com/en/)，全球第二大穩定幣 USDC 的發行商，在 2022 年併購了提供加密資產託管服務的台灣新創 CYBAVO 博歐科技。除了發行 [USDC](https://www.usdc.com/learn/what-is-usdc) 之外，我們在打造 **[Circle Payments Network](https://www.circle.com/cpn)**（CPN） 跟 [Programmable Wallet](https://developers.circle.com/w3s/programmable-wallets)，用受監管的穩定幣（像 USDC）重新定義全球資金怎麼流動。簡單說，就是讓跨境支付變得更快、更便宜、不再卡在傳統金融的種種低效。

我們台灣的工程團隊專注在兩個核心領域：

- 🔐 **Key Management**：打造更安全的私鑰管理方式，比如用 Multi-Party Computation（MPC）跟 Passkeys，來讓用戶和開發者能在不暴露私鑰的情況下安全簽署交易，又不怕弄丟或被盜。
- 💵 **Circle Payment Network**：一個全新的全球支付網路，讓 Payment Service Providers 可以透過 USDC 和 EURC，24/7 、即時完成跨境資金移動。
- 🔧 **Blockchain Infrastructure**：打造區塊鏈核心功能，例如交易廣播、區塊鏈資料索引以提升存取效率、簡化 gas fee 管理等。

我們目前在尋找後端工程師加入團隊：Circle is looking for a highly skilled and expert Senior Backend Engineer to join our dynamic team at Circle. As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will play a meaningful role in developing various services on our wallet infrastructure and maintaining the underlying code.

🔥 **應徵連結**

- Senior/Staff: [https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100636/Senior-Software-Engineer](https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100636/Senior-Software-Engineer)

Circle 與 Sony 合作 ➡️ [Circle 合作索尼 L2「Soneium」將引入 USDC](https://www.blocktempo.com/circle-partners-with-sony-block-solutions-labs-to-introduce-usdc/)

Circle 與 Binance 合作 ➡️ [Circle 與幣安達成戰略合作夥伴關係 推動全球USDC和加密貨幣普及](https://www.blocktempo.com/circle-and-binance-enter-into-strategic-partnership/)

Circle 登入日本 ➡️ [USDC獲批成「日本首個合規穩定幣」，Circle 合作金融巨頭 SBI Holdings 今上架迎3大利好](https://www.blocktempo.com/usdc-becomes-japans-first-regulatory-compliant-stablecoin/)

## 工作地點
混合工作模式，可以自由選擇在家上班，或是到位於信義區的辦公室吹冷氣。
有的同事住在中南部，只有偶爾有 all-hands meeting 或是 team building 活動的時候才會上來台北！

## 工作內容

- Compile and analyze data, processes, and codes to solve problems and identify areas for improvement
- Builds services, APIs, and SDKs which align with data protection standards and aid in the implementation of protection controls for other developers
- Collaborating with the front-end developers and other team members to establish objectives and design more functional, cohesive codes
- Be involved and participate in the overall application lifecycle
- Build high-quality reusable code that can be used in the future
- Conduct whitebox tests and optimize performance
- Participate in conferences and educational programs
- Follow new and emerging technologies and provide training, help, and support to other team members
- Taking the lead on projects, as needed

## 能力需求

- 4 years minimum professional software development experience in object-oriented languages like Go
- Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science or a closely related field.
- Familiar with the Golang Web Framework like Gin, Fasthttps and know the Golang develop related tools like go mod, go lint, etc
- Familiar with database operations like MySQL, Postgresql, NoSql, etc. And understand how to use raw commands to operate databases
- Familiar with unit test development and looking for high-quality coding
- Strong understanding of the microservices development cycle and programming techniques and tools
- Familiar with cryptography would be a plus
- Excellent project and time management skills
- Excellent communication skills (in both English and Mandarin), able to collaborate with remote teams, share ideas and present concepts effectively.
- Self-starter, you enjoy moving at a fast pace, shipping software that improves the user experience and constantly improving your work with little supervision.
- Led teams (2-4) technically on architecture and system design

## 加分能力

- Experience developing REST APIs
- Amazon AWS certifications such as DevOps and/or Solutions Architect Associate/Pro levels
- Familiarity with front-end languages such as HTML, JavaScript, CSS, and Vue.js.

## 面試流程
Senior:
- HR 面試（約 40 分鐘）
- 線上程式測驗（約 90 分鐘）
- Technical Interview*3（60 分鐘 x 2 + 90 分鐘 x 1）
- Behavioral Interview*3 （60 分鐘 x 1 + 30 分鐘 x2）

Junior/Middle level:
- HR 面試（約 40 分鐘）
- 線上程式測驗（約 70 分鐘）
- Technical Interview*2（60 分鐘 x 1 + 90 分鐘 x 1）
- Behavioral Interview*4 （60 分鐘 x 1 + 30 分鐘 x3）

約一個月可以完成所有面試流程

## 薪資範圍
Senior - Staff:
- Base Pay Range: NT$2,100,000 - $2,900,000（月薪：180K - 247K）
- Annual Bonus Target: 12.5-15%
- Also Included: Equity & Benefits

## 福利/推薦項

Home office 補助、每月手機費用補助、員工健康檢查補助、彈性有薪假期（基本上不限制休假天數，只要與主管達成共識即可）
（雖然是外商，但不是 EOR，有提供薪轉跟勞健保）

## 聯絡方式
🔥 **應徵連結：[https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100636/Senior-Software-Engineer](https://careers.circle.com/us/en/job/JR100636/Senior-Software-Engineer)**
Email: [riley.chang@circle.com](mailto:riley.chang@circle.com)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/riley-chang/

歡迎 LinkedIn 私訊我了解更多～

items.title: [Florianopolis, SC] Desenvolvedor Flutter [SENIOR] | Sellers
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga

Estamos buscando um talentoso desenvolvedor Flutter Sênior para se juntar à nossa equipe de desenvolvimento. Como parte essencial da equipe, você será responsável por desenvolver e evoluir nosso aplicativo de alto desempenho.

## Local

Híbrido, Florianópolis

## Benefícios

- R$ 1.300,00

## Contratação

Cooperativa

## Como se candidatar

Por favor envie um email para marcelo@sellers.com.br com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: Vaga Flutter

items.title: Tags normalization
items.description:
A high number of tags refer to the same concept with different wording or different casing/styling for the same words.  
It might be a good idea to add a normalization pipeline for the tags in each company.  
Here is a mapping from original to normalized tags in the form of a python dict (easily convertible in any other format) that might be useful as a starting point: https://github.com/FrancescoManfredi/AIRV-analysis/blob/main/tags_repl.py  
I'm the author of that mapping and this is an invite to make use of it in any way you prefer.

items.title: [遠端] [底薪 2.1-2.9M] Circle 招募 Senior/Staff 區塊鏈工程師 (Golang)
items.description:
## 團隊簡介
我們是 [Circle](https://www.circle.com/en/)，全球前五大加密貨幣 USDC 穩定幣的發行商，在前年併購了提供加密資產託管服務的台灣新創 CYBAVO 博歐科技。除了穩定幣的業務之外，Circle 在去年上線了全新的產品線：以開發者為核心的「Web3 Services」。Web3 Services 的概念類似於 AWS for Blockchain，能透過 API 整合，快速打造安全且支援各種鏈與幣種的區塊鏈服務。目前有兩個主要的產品：Programmable Wallets 以及 Smart Contract Platform，台灣團隊主要負責的就是 [Programmable Wallets](https://www.circle.com/en/programmable-wallets) 的開發。

我們目前在尋找區塊鏈工程師加入團隊：Circle is looking for a highly skilled and experienced Blockchain Engineer to join our dynamic team at Circle. As a Blockchain Engineer, you will play a critical role in connecting various blockchains to our wallet infrastructure and maintaining the underlying code. Your expertise will be instrumental in bridging the gap between our service and blockchain nodes, enabling seamless interaction between the two.

🔥 **應徵連結：[https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002](https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002)**

Circle 與 Grab 合作 ➡️ [Grab整合加密錢包、還能使用NFT優惠券！Circle執行長：10億用戶將進入Web3](https://web3plus.bnext.com.tw/article/1554)

Podcast 採訪 ➡️ [Circle 併購台灣新創、USDC 的發展戰略 ft. CYBAVO 執行長范紀鍠](https://blocktrend.substack.com/p/ep171#details)

## 工作地點
混合工作模式，可以自由選擇在家上班，或是到位於信義區的辦公室吹冷氣。
有的同事住在中南部，只有偶爾有 all-hands meeting 或是 team building 活動的時候才會上來台北！

## 工作內容

- Evaluate new blockchain technologies and their capabilities.
- Develop and validate cryptographic implementations.
- Create highly performant code that is clean, simple, maintainable, and battle-tested with test-driven development (TDD) for maximum test coverage
- Drive continuous improvement in the tech stack.

## 能力需求

- 4+ years of relevant experience 
- Expertise with cryptography, blockchain technologies, and the underlying fundamentals and mathematics.
- Technical understanding of blockchain technologies, including but not limited to BIPs, UTXO, EVM, Nakamoto Consensus, and cryptography.
- Familiar with the Golang Web Framework like Gin, Fasthttps and know the golang develop related tool like go mod, go lint, etc
- Willingness to pick up new and emerging bleeding-edge blockchain technologies
- Excellent communication skills, able to collaborate with remote teams, share ideas, and present concepts effectively.
- Extensive knowledge of secure cryptosystem operating practices is required.

## 加分能力

- Advanced degree in cryptography, computer science, mathematics, or related fields is strongly preferred.
- Experience participating or maintaining in open-source software development is highly preferred.
- Experience with writing smart contracts would be a plus.

## 面試流程

- HR 面試（約 45 分鐘）
- 線上程式測驗（約 90 分鐘）
- Technical Interview*3（60 分鐘 x 2 + 90 分鐘 x 1）
- Behavioral Interview*3 （60 分鐘 x 3）

約一個月可以完成所有面試流程

## 薪資範圍

- Base Pay Range: NT$2,170,000 - $2,975,000（月薪：180K - 247K）
- Annual Bonus Target: 12.5%
- Also Included: Equity & Benefits

## 福利/推薦項

Home office 補助、每月手機費用補助、員工健康檢查補助、彈性有薪假期（基本上不限制休假天數，只要與主管達成共識即可）
（雖然是外商，但不是 EOR，有提供薪轉跟勞健保）

## 聯絡方式
🔥 **應徵連結：[https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002](https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002)**
Email: [riley.chang@circle.com](mailto:riley.chang@circle.com)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuchen227/

歡迎 LinkedIn 私訊我了解更多～
